title: To Apollo. A Short Hymn.
content:
Ph[oe]bus! when that I a verse
    Or some numbers more rehearse,
    Tune my words that they may fall
    Each way smoothly musical:
    For which favour there shall be
    Swans devoted unto thee.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To Apollo. A Short Hymn."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
